meta.name: PRD Auto-Drafter
meta.description: Turn a product brief (problem, audience, goals, constraints) into a structured PRD draft with goals, scope, user stories, success metrics, and open questions.

parameters.content:
## 13 — PRD Auto-Drafter

Send a product brief to the webhook and receive a structured PRD draft.

**Required:** OpenAI API credential, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Tip:** The PRD is a draft — review and refine before sharing with engineers.

**Status:** Beta.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { id: body.id || `prd_${Date.now()}`, feature_name: body.feature_name || body.title || 'Untitled Feature', problem: body.problem || body.description || '', target_audience: body.target_audience || body.audience || '', goals: body.goals || body.success_criteria || '', constraints: body.constraints || body.limitations || '', context: body.context || '', requested_by: body.requested_by || 'Unknown', created_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

values.content: You are a senior product manager writing a PRD. Be concise, specific, and avoid padding. Only write what is grounded in the brief. Mark anything inferred with [ASSUMPTION]. Return valid JSON only.

value.title: Review PRD Draft: {{ $json.title || 'Untitled' }}
value.summary: PRD draft for {{ $json.title }}. {{ $json.user_stories?.length || 0 }} user stories, {{ $json.open_questions?.length || 0 }} open questions.

value.title: 📄 PRD Draft Ready: {{ $('Build PRD Document').first().json.title }}
value.body: PRD draft approved and ready for engineering review. TL;DR: {{ $('Build PRD Document').first().json.tldr }}
